mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointmentUser WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND appointment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-01') AND appointment_date <= LAST_DAY(#{date})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointmentUser ( user_id, appointment_type, appointment_date, appointment_time, create_time, name, remark, phone ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{appointmentType}, #{appointmentDate}, #{appointmentTime}, #{createTime}, #{name}, #{remark}, #{phone} )
mapper.update: INSERT INTO daily_appointment_stats (appointment_date, total_count, max_capacity, update_time) VALUES (#{date}, 1, 10, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_count = total_count + 1, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW()
